ifc_item.name: IfcRelDeclares
ifc_item.definition: The objectified relationshipIfcRelDeclareshandles the declaration of objects (subtypes ofIfcObject) or properties (subtypes ofIfcPropertyDefinition) to a project or project library (represented byIfcProject, orIfcProjectLibrary).

original_text: Length Unit: Defaults to meters (SI). For imperial systems, inches are recommended.

ifc_item.name: ThermalTransmittance
ifc_item.definition: Thermal transmittance coefficient (U-Value) of the element.
